flows.description: Pull held dogfoodandfun.com comments via WP REST, auto-trash spam, queue rest for Telegram approval. Source: social-automation/CLAUDE.md L31 (Engagement Pipeline — wp-comment-handler Daily 9:00 PM Israel).

_notes: wp_scan moderation actions are NOT rate-limited (site-owner action on own property, per ADR-0001). Slice B added flows[].
